{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/47360190?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pranjalithakur", "id": 47360190, "login": "pranjalithakur", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ3MzYwMTkw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pranjalithakur", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54465", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact

If this library is used to implement a WebSocket server on top of a TCP server (rather than an HTTP server or framework) using the `WebSocket::Driver.server()` method, or, if it is used to complement a WebSocket client, then a peer can make a single connection consume an unbounded amount of memory by sending an HTTP request or response with a never-ending list of headers. This can lead to the receiving process running out of memory.

### Patches

The issue has been patched in version 0.8.1, by limiting the total size of HTTP request/response lines and headers accepted by the parser to 32 kB. All users should upgrade to this version.

### Workarounds

No known workarounds exist.

### Acknowledgements

This issue was discovered and reported by Pranjali Thakur, DepthFirst Security Research Team.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00445, "percentile": 0.36003}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-15T22:05:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54465"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-15T22:05:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/faye/websocket-driver-ruby/security/advisories/GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw", "https://github.com/faye/websocket-driver-ruby/releases/tag/0.8.1", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/websocket-driver/CVE-2026-54465.yml", "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord/SearchResults?query=CVE-2026-54465", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/faye/websocket-driver-ruby/security-advisories/GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/faye/websocket-driver-ruby", "summary": "websocket-driver: Memory exhaustion in HTTP header parser", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-15T22:05:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8j3g-f24p-4mpw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "websocket-driver"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: websocket-driver: Memory exhaustion in HTTP header parser
